Total $34,410,943

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,558,689 (36.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.73 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:56.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,831 opening theaters/2,831 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $83,185,627

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 16th, 2007 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: July 17th, 2007 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violent content, disturbing images, thematic material and brief language
Running Time: 97 minutes
Plot point: Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Infidelity, Mental Illness, Relationships Gone Wrong, Time Travel
Social setting: Mental Hospital
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Tri-Star Pictures, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Hyde Park Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
